dict.string: LocalRock talks directly to your robot vacuum over your local network: to your own self-hosted server, and to the robot's own Wi-Fi access point while you set it up. Nothing is sent to the developer.
LocalRock displays the live video feed from your robot vacuum's built-in camera. It does not access your device's own camera.
LocalRock plays the audio that accompanies your robot vacuum's live camera feed. It does not record with your device's microphone.
